package rulecoverage

func NegativeByteStringConversionInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "byte_string_conversion_in_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Byte-to-string or string-to-byte conversion observed inside loops in short-lived lookup or append paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
